Welcome to HSP Marketing.
Celebrating 30 years of fresh ideas.

View Our Clients
View Our Work

We are a full-service marketing agency specializing agriculture/poultry industry, education, healthcare/pharmaceuticals, hospitality/entertainment, municipalities, recruiting, building/construction, technology, and non-profit.

LEARN ABOUT US

What We Do

Marketing Strategy
We plan a lot and we love to make plans for our clients. Marketing plans, that is. We develop strategies that bring you and your audience closer together at every turn.
Branding
We dig deep to uncover the core of your brand. Then, we boldly tell your story to your customers. More than a logo, colors or typography, we believe your brand is your soul.
Advertising
Our secret recipe for advertising? Tell the truth. But tell it in a way so compelling it can’t be ignored. There’s something about great advertising that entertains as well as sells.
Digital
We bring web design, content, and human interaction together in award-winning fashion. HSP and SoMe Connect will enhance your marketing efforts with planning, developing, and executing SEO, PPC, email campaigns, and social media.
Design
To say we are typography nerds, color fanatics or spatial-relationship gurus would be a gross understatement. We put our hearts into crafting every design piece so it’s unique, bold and memorable.
Publishing
If you write it, we will publish. We design book covers and layout pages. Everything from pagination to marketing and PR, we get your book out there.

Notable Clients

Industries Served

Healthcare
From pharmaceuticals to benefits, we are totally immersed in Healthcare marketing and have the resources necessary for this complicated industry.
Building & Construction
We have a solid background working with builders, products and related services in commercial and residential environments.
Technology
Technology has always been a foundation of our business. We develop marketing for a wide range of consumer products and services.
Community

We have a successful track record marketing non-profits centered around their biggest annual fundraising programs and events.

Education

We know retail, literally from the inside out. We have experience with In-store, packaging, POP and promotions for major consumer chains.

Agriculture

We work with both established and emerging authors to get their books designed, produced and delivered.

Let’s make something happen
